title: Can't clock out (ritual reframe)
hook: You can't leave the office when the office is your kitchen table.
body:
So stop trying to leave. Change the room instead.

One match. The overhead light off, one warm light on. Your brain gets the signal it's been missing: the day is done.

We didn't build a candle for how it smells on a shelf. We built it for that 6pm moment when your home has to become a home again.
cta: What's your "the day is done" signal? Tell me below.
sourceInsight: Audience pain: 'my brain won't clock out' — reframed candle as a switch-off ritual (demo).
